name: Fleming, Eunice
clubs: Member of Y. W. C. A. Council, '26, '27
description: There was a charming little girl who came to S. T. C., She had so many charming traits, them all we could not see, She did so very many things and did them all so well, How we could have done without her would be hard for us to tell.
text: There was a charming little girl who came to S. T. C., She had so many charming traits, them all we could not see, She did so very many things and did them all so well, How we could have done without her would be hard for us to tell.

name: McLendon, R. D.
description: Mac's ever-ready smile and cheerful words have won for him the respect of the faculty and the admiration of the student body. As a student he is one of S. T. C.'s greatest assets, and he has taken an active part in the promotion of every college activity. With his strong will, personality and leadership we predict nothing but success.
text: Mac's ever-ready smile and cheerful words have won for him the respect of the faculty and the admiration of the student body. As a student he is one of S. T. C.'s greatest assets, and he has taken an active part in the promotion of every college activity. With his strong will, personality and leadership we predict nothing but success.

name: George, Mrs. J. B.
description: Truth is the essence of her nature. Well may her dancing eyes beam always, and her radiant smile be ever joyous, because all the loveliness of earth goes out to meet true loveliness of character.
text: Truth is the essence of her nature. Well may her dancing eyes beam always, and her radiant smile be ever joyous, because all the loveliness of earth goes out to meet true loveliness of character.

name: Smith, Wilma Druchilla
clubs: Treasurer, Vice-President, President Mississippian Literary Society
Delegate to Student Volunteer Conference Detroit, '28
description: Willing to do her part, Interesting worker, Lends a helping hand, Makes friends easily, Age "Sweet Sixteen." S smiling at all times, M ajor—Home Economics, I last—you first, T rue to her Y. W. C. A. ideals, H appy in her work.
text: Willing to do her part, Interesting worker, Lends a helping hand, Makes friends easily, Age "Sweet Sixteen." S smiling at all times, M ajor—Home Economics, I last—you first, T rue to her Y. W. C. A. ideals, H appy in her work.

name: Anderson, Robert A.
description: Robert is a true and generous friend, a hard and conscientious worker alike in his studies and student activities. With his high Christian ideals of thought and living, combined with his genial personality, he has won a prominent place in the hearts of numberless friends.
text: Robert is a true and generous friend, a hard and conscientious worker alike in his studies and student activities. With his high Christian ideals of thought and living, combined with his genial personality, he has won a prominent place in the hearts of numberless friends.

name: Bryant, Velma
description: Although Bryant has been with us only two years, we have learned to love her because of her loyalty and faithfulness. She has won the admiration of both faculty and students. We admire her for her ambition, and hope for her a glorious future.
text: Although Bryant has been with us only two years, we have learned to love her because of her loyalty and faithfulness. She has won the admiration of both faculty and students. We admire her for her ambition, and hope for her a glorious future.

name: Thompson, R. L.
motto: "Excelsior,"
description: The inherent motto of her life is "Excelsior," the flash of her lovely brown eyes tells a story of achievement, while the light of her lingering smile commands admiration.
text:
"Excelsior,"
The inherent motto of her life is "Excelsior," the flash of her lovely brown eyes tells a story of achievement, while the light of her lingering smile commands admiration.

name: Stennis, Pauline
description: We feel that she is greater than we know The human will that moves unseen Can climb to any goal. The best tribute that we know is that she is an all-around girl who is not too pious to have a good time and not too bad to be called sweet.
text: We feel that she is greater than we know The human will that moves unseen Can climb to any goal. The best tribute that we know is that she is an all-around girl who is not too pious to have a good time and not too bad to be called sweet.

name: Landin, Emma E.
clubs: Devotional Chairman of the Y. W. C. A. Cabinet, '29
Corresponding Secretary of the World Affairs Club, '29
Delegate to Blue Ridge Y. W. C. A. Conference '28
description: In her quiet, unassuming way, Emma has made a most splendid college record. Her big heart of sympathy, cheerfulness, patience and sincerity, combined with noble purposes and high idealism has endeared her to all who know her.
text: In her quiet, unassuming way, Emma has made a most splendid college record. Her big heart of sympathy, cheerfulness, patience and sincerity, combined with noble purposes and high idealism has endeared her to all who know her.

name: Craft, Harvey M.
description: Craft is another student whose influence is felt rather than heard, for he never blusters over things he is doing. He just does them silently and competently. We wish him the best of luck.
text: Craft is another student whose influence is felt rather than heard, for he never blusters over things he is doing. He just does them silently and competently. We wish him the best of luck.

name: Sigler, Mrs. C. M.
description: Sincere in thought, honest in action, agreeable in spirit, artistic in temperament, with a heart ever kind and true, a genial smile for everyone, are only a few of her characteristics.
text: Sincere in thought, honest in action, agreeable in spirit, artistic in temperament, with a heart ever kind and true, a genial smile for everyone, are only a few of her characteristics.

name: Maples, Hattie Bea
description: Steady progress on the upward road has marked each year of her college life. Coming to us with an ideal, and leaving with a fine record and a host of friends, her career has proven the real value of devotion and hard work. To know her is to love her. In the same quiet, steady, tenacious way we expect Hattie Bea to continue on the upward way until the goal of her ambition is reached.
text: Steady progress on the upward road has marked each year of her college life. Coming to us with an ideal, and leaving with a fine record and a host of friends, her career has proven the real value of devotion and hard work. To know her is to love her. In the same quiet, steady, tenacious way we expect Hattie Bea to continue on the upward way until the goal of her ambition is reached.

name: Glisson, James D.
motto: "Experience joined with common sense, To mortals is a providence."
text: "Experience joined with common sense, To mortals is a providence."

name: Mclaughlin, Lucille
description: Clear vision, winning nature, capable and serene And truly a wizard at the typing machine Lucile came to S. T. C. in her Junior year. A true type of the successful student; winning personality, quiet capability and sincerity of purpose—Lucile goes out well-armed for service. Your success is our joy.
text: Clear vision, winning nature, capable and serene And truly a wizard at the typing machine Lucile came to S. T. C. in her Junior year. A true type of the successful student; winning personality, quiet capability and sincerity of purpose—Lucile goes out well-armed for service. Your success is our joy.

name: Doyle, Fleta
motto: "Age cannot wither her, nor custom stale her infinite variety."
description: Fleta is jolly, good-natured and true, and is always willing to do her share.
text:
"Age cannot wither her, nor custom stale her infinite variety."
Fleta is jolly, good-natured and true, and is always willing to do her share.

name: Franklin, V. O.
clubs: Officer in every important organization on the campus
description: Most versatile—most musical—most popular. An officer in every important organization on the campus speaks one thing for Franklin—personality.
text: Most versatile—most musical—most popular. An officer in every important organization on the campus speaks one thing for Franklin—personality.

name: Fairley, Mamye
motto: "Two roads diverged in a wood, and I—I took the one less traveled by and that has made all the difference."
text: "Two roads diverged in a wood, and I—I took the one less traveled by and that has made all the difference."

name: Hamberlin, Sara Virginia
description: Sara Virginia is a blonde that gentlemen prefer, Five foot two is the size of her, She claims that teaching is her plan, But she won't teach long—ask any man.
text: Sara Virginia is a blonde that gentlemen prefer, Five foot two is the size of her, She claims that teaching is her plan, But she won't teach long—ask any man.

name: Kinard, C. B.
motto: "Not over serious, never too frivolous, But a rare good fellow."
text: "Not over serious, never too frivolous, But a rare good fellow."

name: Busby, Lois
description: "You know that old saying about precious things coming in small packages, don't you? Well, that's Lois."
text: "You know that old saying about precious things coming in small packages, don't you? Well, that's Lois."

name: Hemphill, Ida Josephine
description: Link together a keen mind, sparkling wit, and genuine understanding, and imagine, if you can, the result. Possessing these while yet a girl, what will she be as a woman?
text: Link together a keen mind, sparkling wit, and genuine understanding, and imagine, if you can, the result. Possessing these while yet a girl, what will she be as a woman?

name: Martin, J. H.
motto: "All things come to those who wait," yes, a college diploma and a beautiful young wife have come to our "ABE" this year; however, he "waited" only for the diploma. His ability and congeniality assure his success.
clubs: President Ever-Ready B. Y. P. U., '28
Member Y. M. C. A. Cabinet, '29
Chairman of Employment Y. M. C. A., '29
text: "All things come to those who wait," yes, a college diploma and a beautiful young wife have come to our "ABE" this year; however, he "waited" only for the diploma. His ability and congeniality assure his success.

name: Stevens, Louise
motto:
"There is no room for sadness
When we see a cherry smile;
It always has the same good look
It's never out of style."
text:
"There is no room for sadness
When we see a cherry smile;
It always has the same good look
It's never out of style."

name: Velma, Woods
description: Quiet and somewhat aloof from the masses of us—but once you know her, you wonder why you didn't suspect it all before.
text: Quiet and somewhat aloof from the masses of us—but once you know her, you wonder why you didn't suspect it all before.

name: E. C., McNeil
description: "Mac" is a jovial, though serious, hardworking fellow and is always striving to encourage everything that is for the good of the group. His going away will mean a great loss to the college, but a great gain to the community that secures his services.
text: "Mac" is a jovial, though serious, hardworking fellow and is always striving to encourage everything that is for the good of the group. His going away will mean a great loss to the college, but a great gain to the community that secures his services.

name: Martha Elizabeth, Gibson
description: The class of '29 is proud to claim "Lib" as one of its most worthy members. She is a hard worker and is ever true to her class and fellow students. Only by a close and personal friendship can a person know the real worth of this student.
text: The class of '29 is proud to claim "Lib" as one of its most worthy members. She is a hard worker and is ever true to her class and fellow students. Only by a close and personal friendship can a person know the real worth of this student.

name: Ellis, S. Gwendolen
description: Gwendolen is in a class to herself. She is a combination of integrity, determination, sincerity, loyalty, originality, thoroughness, patience and pep. Her hobby is making faces-on paper. Few have equalled her; none have surpassed her.
text: Gwendolen is in a class to herself. She is a combination of integrity, determination, sincerity, loyalty, originality, thoroughness, patience and pep. Her hobby is making faces-on paper. Few have equalled her; none have surpassed her.

name: Phillips, L. G.
description: Phillips is a serious-minded man and should make his way in the world in his quiet and unobtrusive way.
text: Phillips is a serious-minded man and should make his way in the world in his quiet and unobtrusive way.

name: Yager, Hazel
motto: "Always faithful, kind and true, Looking for something good to do."
description: Into Hazel has been incorporated those fine qualities of life that make for success. Her life, though broad and full, may be summarized in these words:
text:
"Always faithful, kind and true, Looking for something good to do."
Into Hazel has been incorporated those fine qualities of life that make for success. Her life, though broad and full, may be summarized in these words:

name: Moore, Marie
description: Marie's temper never gets ruffled. She is gracious to everybody. We have not decided whether her perfect poise or her lovely profile is her richest gift. She learns psychology readily-and teaches with equal ease twelfth grade English in the Demonstration School. Where is there another like her?
text: Marie's temper never gets ruffled. She is gracious to everybody. We have not decided whether her perfect poise or her lovely profile is her richest gift. She learns psychology readily-and teaches with equal ease twelfth grade English in the Demonstration School. Where is there another like her?

name: Davis, F. E.
motto: "Neka Camon."
description: A big boy with a big heart, "Tiny" has a fun-loving disposition with just enough seriousness to make him thoroughly likable. His two hundred-weight of pounds is only one of the many things that keep him from having a single enemy on the campus.
text:
"Neka Camon."
A big boy with a big heart, "Tiny" has a fun-loving disposition with just enough seriousness to make him thoroughly likable. His two hundred-weight of pounds is only one of the many things that keep him from having a single enemy on the campus.

name: Messer, Patricia B.
clubs: Delegate to Jackson World Affairs Conference, '28
description: "Patty" is Irish in the twinkle of her eyes and her gay laughter; English in her calm, sure way of doing things; Scotch in her marked sincerity; an all-around American in loyalty to life and friends.
text: "Patty" is Irish in the twinkle of her eyes and her gay laughter; English in her calm, sure way of doing things; Scotch in her marked sincerity; an all-around American in loyalty to life and friends.

name: Alford, Mildred
motto:
"To see her is to love her,
And love her but forever,
For nature made her what she is,
…And made another never."
description: This is a good description of Mildred, for she is made up of the qualities that make us all love her.
text:
"To see her is to love her,
And love her but forever,
For nature made her what she is,
…And made another never."
This is a good description of Mildred, for she is made up of the qualities that make us all love her.

name: Biskerstaff, G. Guy
description: Since "Bick" came into the ranks of our class we have come to admire him as a musician, a student and a gentleman. By his ever-willingness to help and work he has won for himself a host of friends.
text: Since "Bick" came into the ranks of our class we have come to admire him as a musician, a student and a gentleman. By his ever-willingness to help and work he has won for himself a host of friends.

name: Childrens, W. F.
description: “Bill” has qualities that make a wonderful personality; a lover of sportsmanship and a good sport himself.
text: “Bill” has qualities that make a wonderful personality; a lover of sportsmanship and a good sport himself.

name: Adams, Grace
description: Few there are to match her—noble, true, refined, She will be remembered always—for her heart was always kind.
text: Few there are to match her—noble, true, refined, She will be remembered always—for her heart was always kind.

name: Chrestman, J. H.
motto: “Rare compound of quality, noble and true, With plenty of sense and good humor, too.”
description: His nerve and determination on the athletic field and his scholastic ability have won for him distinction.
text:
“Rare compound of quality, noble and true, With plenty of sense and good humor, too.”
His nerve and determination on the athletic field and his scholastic ability have won for him distinction.

name: McGehee, Lila Mae
description: Self-assured, happy-go-lucky Lila Mae, with a gleeful zest for life, which she finds most beautiful and interesting.
text: Self-assured, happy-go-lucky Lila Mae, with a gleeful zest for life, which she finds most beautiful and interesting.

name: Smith, W. C.
description: If pluck and determination to win out at all costs means anything in life, we know that Smith will win by a large margin.
text: If pluck and determination to win out at all costs means anything in life, we know that Smith will win by a large margin.

name: Owen, Lillian
description: Abundant in thoughts, more than in speech.
text: Abundant in thoughts, more than in speech.

name: Myers, Lucile
description: Lucile is a serious-minded, efficient student. With her determination and ability, we predict for her success.
text: Lucile is a serious-minded, efficient student. With her determination and ability, we predict for her success.

name: Lockler, Mary Alice
description: She cries not over spilt milk, She does not gossip nor frown; She is no respecter of persons, Whether from country or town.
text: She cries not over spilt milk, She does not gossip nor frown; She is no respecter of persons, Whether from country or town.

name: Craft, A. E.
description: In his quiet and unassuming way Craft has won the love and respect of all who know him.
text: In his quiet and unassuming way Craft has won the love and respect of all who know him.

name: Brantley, W. A.
description: He is a jolly old boy and dependable on the gridiron. Go to it, "Bulldog," we are for you!
text: He is a jolly old boy and dependable on the gridiron. Go to it, "Bulldog," we are for you!

name: Middleton, Eunice
description: Steadfast loyalty in friendship, thoughtfulness in service, unfaltering ambition to succeed, combine in making Eunice one of S. T. C.'s best assets.
text: Steadfast loyalty in friendship, thoughtfulness in service, unfaltering ambition to succeed, combine in making Eunice one of S. T. C.'s best assets.

name: Cochran, Gladys
motto:
"She's stylish, clever, all in one,
And temperamental—well, yes, some;
And when she tries, she gets things
done."
text:
"She's stylish, clever, all in one,
And temperamental—well, yes, some;
And when she tries, she gets things
done."

name: Segrest, Jessie
motto: "Although tiny in stature, she is "So Big' with us."
text: "Although tiny in stature, she is "So Big' with us."

name: Thompson, Louise
motto:
"So tethered to the stars
She cannot run away,
And all that makes or mars
Shall find, and leave her, gay."
text:
"So tethered to the stars
She cannot run away,
And all that makes or mars
Shall find, and leave her, gay."

name: Boyd, Mattie Ruth
description: Our hats are off to one endowed with such noble gifts—talents, personality, and rare intellectual ability.
text: Our hats are off to one endowed with such noble gifts—talents, personality, and rare intellectual ability.

name: Williams, J. J.
motto: "Time and tide waits for no man,"
description: and neither does faithful, cheerful, mischievous Williams—when he rings the college bell.
text:
"Time and tide waits for no man,"
and neither does faithful, cheerful, mischievous Williams—when he rings the college bell.

name: Bailey, Nannie Laura
description: Nannie has gone about her work quietly, but with this same quietness has won her way into the hearts of many students.
text: Nannie has gone about her work quietly, but with this same quietness has won her way into the hearts of many students.

name: Bullock, Edna Lois
description: Reminiscences of her like soft music Fibrate in the memory. She is a student that is faithful to a trust, willing to assume responsibility and capable of performing duty conscientiously.
text: Reminiscences of her like soft music Fibrate in the memory. She is a student that is faithful to a trust, willing to assume responsibility and capable of performing duty conscientiously.

name: Johnson, Max
description: Max, the tiny man of much power, came to us in '25 and he has ever since been a loyal and consistent worker. We find embodied in Max the essential characteristics of a perfect gentleman. He has tact, personality and wisdom. Go to it, Max, we are for you.
text: Max, the tiny man of much power, came to us in '25 and he has ever since been a loyal and consistent worker. We find embodied in Max the essential characteristics of a perfect gentleman. He has tact, personality and wisdom. Go to it, Max, we are for you.

name: Denman, Alma Lee
motto: "She is active, stirring, all afire, Cannot rest, cannot tire."
description: Did anyone ever see Alma Lee sitting entirely quiet in a corner thinking? Well, I believe not. Alma Lee is entirely too full of action and the joy of living. She is never gloomy nor blue, because to her there is always a silver lining to the darkest cloud.
text:
"She is active, stirring, all afire, Cannot rest, cannot tire."
Did anyone ever see Alma Lee sitting entirely quiet in a corner thinking? Well, I believe not. Alma Lee is entirely too full of action and the joy of living. She is never gloomy nor blue, because to her there is always a silver lining to the darkest cloud.

name: Strange, Essie Eleanor
description: Above her charming modesty towers the record of her successes. Dependable, loving, sincere, is Eleanor; a priceless friend.
text: Above her charming modesty towers the record of her successes. Dependable, loving, sincere, is Eleanor; a priceless friend.

name: Richardson, M. L.
description: "Rich" has made a good record as a student, and in the meantime, has found time to cut hair and make friends. We prophesy for him a career of unbroken usefulness.
text: "Rich" has made a good record as a student, and in the meantime, has found time to cut hair and make friends. We prophesy for him a career of unbroken usefulness.

name: Calhoun, Lollie
description: Pleasant thoughts of happy hours bring back to us memories of our dear friend, Lollie Calhoun. She is a deserving girl and an ambitious student, a loyal and generous pal, whose friendship we value with all our heart.
text: Pleasant thoughts of happy hours bring back to us memories of our dear friend, Lollie Calhoun. She is a deserving girl and an ambitious student, a loyal and generous pal, whose friendship we value with all our heart.

name: Hill, Sara Frances
description: Our school day memories remind us of a girl whose worth is inestimable. Sara is a thoughtful and sincere friend, an efficient student with high ideals and a pure Christian character.
text: Our school day memories remind us of a girl whose worth is inestimable. Sara is a thoughtful and sincere friend, an efficient student with high ideals and a pure Christian character.

name: Raden, B. G.
clubs: Know Mississippi Better Train with Band, '28
description: Raden does not make much noise except when he has his bass horn. But as a debater, orator, singer and student, he ranks with the best. His sincerity and nobleness of character have won for him the respect of both faculty and students.
text: Raden does not make much noise except when he has his bass horn. But as a debater, orator, singer and student, he ranks with the best. His sincerity and nobleness of character have won for him the respect of both faculty and students.

name: Batson, Gladys
description: With Gladys, our musical genius, the class of '29 is making a distinct contribution to society.
text: With Gladys, our musical genius, the class of '29 is making a distinct contribution to society.

name: Bielenberg, Adele Marie
description: Adele hails from the coast. She is an eager, progressive student with high ideals, gentle manners, and a readiness to co-operate in everything that is good.
text: Adele hails from the coast. She is an eager, progressive student with high ideals, gentle manners, and a readiness to co-operate in everything that is good.

name: Webb, Lula
clubs: President Mississippian Literary Society Summer Quarter, '26
description: Individual in both ways and looks, she has proven herself capable and dependable in her duties—and besides all that she finds time for the frivolous.
text: Individual in both ways and looks, she has proven herself capable and dependable in her duties—and besides all that she finds time for the frivolous.

name: Thomas, Lula J.
motto:
"When Joy and Duty clash,
Let Duty go to smash."
text:
"When Joy and Duty clash,
Let Duty go to smash."

name: Turner, Mabel Edrie
description: Edrie is a true friend and a faithful worker. Her pleasing manner has won for her the confidence of faculty and students. She is true-hearted, whole-hearted, faithful and kind and her modesty is the grace of her soul.
text: Edrie is a true friend and a faithful worker. Her pleasing manner has won for her the confidence of faculty and students. She is true-hearted, whole-hearted, faithful and kind and her modesty is the grace of her soul.

name: Brewer, W. D.
description: Brewer is another of those working collegians. From dawn to twilight he has been on the job and he rightly deserves his "dip." He is strong in his convictions and true in his judgments and in every way is a likable fellow.
text: Brewer is another of those working collegians. From dawn to twilight he has been on the job and he rightly deserves his "dip." He is strong in his convictions and true in his judgments and in every way is a likable fellow.

name: Reynolds, Bertha Lesta
description: Bertha rivals Miss Brown in her knowledge and enjoyment of history. She supports athletics with a fervor. For Bertha there is no halfway ground. She is absolutely dependable and always sincere. We expect to see her name in "Who's Who" soon.
text: Bertha rivals Miss Brown in her knowledge and enjoyment of history. She supports athletics with a fervor. For Bertha there is no halfway ground. She is absolutely dependable and always sincere. We expect to see her name in "Who's Who" soon.

name: Mclean, Mabel
motto:
"The light of love; the purity of grace,
With mind and music breathing from her face."
description: Mabel is to us sweetness and dignity, ability and true friendship. She comes to us from Florida and the balmy breezes are reflected in her smile. Here's to Pensacola!
text:
"The light of love; the purity of grace,
With mind and music breathing from her face."
Mabel is to us sweetness and dignity, ability and true friendship. She comes to us from Florida and the balmy breezes are reflected in her smile. Here's to Pensacola!

name: Taylor, J. W.
clubs: Charter Member Prestonian Literary Society, President, Vice-President, Secretary, Chaplin, Critic, Orator, Prestonian Literary Society
Track Team, Basketball, President Student Government, Editor "Neka Camon."
description: A friend when a friend is needed, a sincere Christian gentleman at all times, and he is able and willing to serve. He has made a success as a teacher, as a county superintendent as well as all other activities in which he has entered. We need more like him.
text: A friend when a friend is needed, a sincere Christian gentleman at all times, and he is able and willing to serve. He has made a success as a teacher, as a county superintendent as well as all other activities in which he has entered. We need more like him.

name: Taylor, Mrs. J. W.
description: When we think of her ability, efficiency, unselfish service, sincerity of purpose, devotion to duty, strength of character, beauty of soul, and the super qualities which make her a "good sport," we are led to exclaim, "what a woman!"
text: When we think of her ability, efficiency, unselfish service, sincerity of purpose, devotion to duty, strength of character, beauty of soul, and the super qualities which make her a "good sport," we are led to exclaim, "what a woman!"

name: Mabel, McGee
clubs: Secretary Sherwood Bonner Literary Society, First Quarter, '28
description: Happy, happy, always happy, happy as can be, She's just the type, the very type that you would like to see.
text: Happy, happy, always happy, happy as can be, She's just the type, the very type that you would like to see.

name: O. A., McKnight
description: Though modest, on his unembarrassed brow nature has written "gentleman."
text: Though modest, on his unembarrassed brow nature has written "gentleman."

name: Myrtis, McMahon
description: Those who know Myrtis best, love her best; her patience and idealism will carry her safely over life's rough places; and, come what may, we are expecting much of her.
text: Those who know Myrtis best, love her best; her patience and idealism will carry her safely over life's rough places; and, come what may, we are expecting much of her.

name: Jackson, Crystine
clubs: Delegate to Y. W. C. A. Conference, '28

name: Jackson, V. S.
description: Although "Simp" is endowed with a silver tongue, he is by no means a singer. The easy and seemingly care-free manner in which he approaches his friends, and the unique way in which he handles himself, have won him a host of friends. We predict for him a great future.
text: Although "Simp" is endowed with a silver tongue, he is by no means a singer. The easy and seemingly care-free manner in which he approaches his friends, and the unique way in which he handles himself, have won him a host of friends. We predict for him a great future.

name: Penn, Elzie V.
motto: "When there's a will, there's a way,"
clubs: Know Mississippi Better Train with Band, '28
Social Chairman of the Mississippi Literary Society, '29
Social Chairman Y. W. C. A., '29
description: seems to be "Penny's" motto, for she has made good in everything she has undertaken. If friends be riches, she is a second Croesus. She has a smile, a cheerful greeting and a good word for everyone she meets.
text:
"When there's a will, there's a way,"
seems to be "Penny's" motto, for she has made good in everything she has undertaken. If friends be riches, she is a second Croesus. She has a smile, a cheerful greeting and a good word for everyone she meets.

name: Thorne Hood, Thelma
description: High ideals, a lovable character and a most attractive personality have endeared Thorne to both faculty and students. She is a gifted student, a staunch friend and an adorable home-maker.
text: High ideals, a lovable character and a most attractive personality have endeared Thorne to both faculty and students. She is a gifted student, a staunch friend and an adorable home-maker.

name: Rankin, J. I.
clubs: Chairman Y. M. C. A. Social Committee, '28
description: To know Rankin is to be his friend; those who know him best appreciate his strength, honesty, sincerity and above all, his Christian character. In all college activities he has demonstrated his ability to lead and his willingness to serve.
text: To know Rankin is to be his friend; those who know him best appreciate his strength, honesty, sincerity and above all, his Christian character. In all college activities he has demonstrated his ability to lead and his willingness to serve.

name: Coney, Hazel
description: There's language in her eyes, her cheeks, her lips, Grace in all her steps and in every gesture, dignity and love.
text: There's language in her eyes, her cheeks, her lips, Grace in all her steps and in every gesture, dignity and love.

name: Brasfield, S. A.
description: As an earnest student, a hard worker, and a loyal friend, "Bill" is unexcelled. He puts his best into everything that he undertakes. It is probably unfair to say that "Bill" has a feminine weakness, but he admits that "it is better to have loved and lost than never to have loved at all."
text: As an earnest student, a hard worker, and a loyal friend, "Bill" is unexcelled. He puts his best into everything that he undertakes. It is probably unfair to say that "Bill" has a feminine weakness, but he admits that "it is better to have loved and lost than never to have loved at all."

name: Hardin, Frances Louise
description: Her wisdom, personality and humor make her an individual and a favorite, a true sport in everything.
text: Her wisdom, personality and humor make her an individual and a favorite, a true sport in everything.

name: Bradley, A. E.
description: Bradley is persistent; he has been with us off and on for so long that we barely remember when he first made connection. He is a real good fellow and one we will always be glad to remember.
text: Bradley is persistent; he has been with us off and on for so long that we barely remember when he first made connection. He is a real good fellow and one we will always be glad to remember.

name: Segrest, Fannie
description: Fannie is another of these quiet girls who spends her time thinking and doing rather than saying. She is a splendid product of the English room and a "shark" at many other things. One who is a faithful, loyal and true friend—that is Fannie.
text: Fannie is another of these quiet girls who spends her time thinking and doing rather than saying. She is a splendid product of the English room and a "shark" at many other things. One who is a faithful, loyal and true friend—that is Fannie.

name: Woods, Robert Lee
description: Bobbie Lee hails from the good old county of Yazoo. He is a thinker, a doer, a friend, frank, ambitious and dependable; a born leader of men and women, athletically and socially inclined.
text: Bobbie Lee hails from the good old county of Yazoo. He is a thinker, a doer, a friend, frank, ambitious and dependable; a born leader of men and women, athletically and socially inclined.

name: Williams, Edna Pearl
motto: "I live and love, what would you more?"
description: During the two years we have known her Edna Pearl has proven to be a true Southern girl. Ever modest, winsome, gay and fair. She has that frank kind of friendliness that warms the heart and wins love in early acquaintance.
text:
"I live and love, what would you more?"
During the two years we have known her Edna Pearl has proven to be a true Southern girl. Ever modest, winsome, gay and fair. She has that frank kind of friendliness that warms the heart and wins love in early acquaintance.
